issues.description: Effect 1 is missing condition check. 'If this Character would be K.O.'d by your opponent's effect' requires a condition that distinguishes opponent-caused KO. Current DSL has no condition to filter for opponent's effect as source.

Action should prevent KO (conditional replacement effect), not just trash a card. 'instead' indicates this trashes a card AS AN ALTERNATIVE to being KO'd. Current DSL does not model the prevention mechanic.
RevealFromHand is incorrect. Effect states 'Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck', not hand. Should be a Reveal action from deck, not RevealFromHand.
Filter checks 'subType' but text says 'If that card's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates"' — this should check for a type/keyword match, not subType specifically. May need type-based filter.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is wrong. Text says 'until the end of your opponent's next turn', which is during opponent's turn → should be 'DuringOpponentTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'.

suggestedDsl.note: Conditional KO prevention requires custom condition logic not fully expressible in current DSL schema. Suggest revision to support 'OnWouldBeKO' with opponent-source condition and replacement effect.
